'''Desdemona''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Blind Luck]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
